content.text: Best practiceDefine any nested types at the top of your class type.
Define any nested types at the top of your class type.

While you can forward declare a nested type after the definition of the enclosing class, since the enclosing class will already contain a declaration for the nested type, doing so is redundant.Next lesson15.4Introduction to destructorsBack to table of contentsPrevious lesson15.2Classes and header files
